de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.join

Class ProspectivePartner

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.join.ProspectivePartner

  • public class ProspectivePartner
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the partners of a join operation.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ProspectivePartner

        public ProspectivePartner(Term commonFormula,
                          Node node1,
                          SequentFormula formula1,
                          Term update1,
                          Node node2,
                          SequentFormula formula2,
                          Term update2)
        Constructs a new prospective partner object, i.e. a structure comprising the information about two partners of a join operation.
        Parameters:
        commonFormula - The common formula of a join operation, i.e. the "symbolic state - program counter" part of the join.
        node1 - The first node of the join.
        formula1 - The first join formula.
        update1 - The first symbolic state.
        node2 - The second node of the join.
        formula2 - The second join formula.
        update2 - The second symbolic state.
